rawContent:
Now I have comprehensive information. Let me compile the road conditions report.

---

## 🚗 Washington State Road Conditions Report
**As of February 19-20, 2026**

---

### **I-5 (Seattle Corridor)** ⚠️ MAJOR DELAYS

**Active Construction - Revive I-5 Project:**
- **2 northbound lanes CLOSED** on the Ship Canal Bridge for the $178M repaving project
- Express lanes are running **northbound-only ALL DAY** during construction
- Project duration: Nearly all of 2026 and 2027

**Current Impact:**
- **Southbound morning commutes from Lynnwood to downtown Seattle:** Averaging **50+ minutes** (up from normal 35 min) - delays of ~50%
- **Southbound peak times (Tue-Fri):** Can exceed **65+ minutes**
- **Northbound is less impacted** due to express lanes pointing north
- **I-405 and Hwy 99** are also congested from diversion traffic

**Additional Alert (Feb 19):**
- **Highway 99/First Avenue South Bridge:** Right 2 northbound lanes CLOSED for maintenance, speed reduced to 25 mph. Traffic backing up onto Highway 509. No estimated reopening time.

---

### **I-90 (Snoqualmie Pass)** ⚠️ WINTER WEATHER ADVISORY

**Weather Forecast at Pass (elevation ~3,000 ft):**
- **Today:** 20% chance of snow, 24°F
- **Friday:** 30% chance of snow, highs near 27°F
- **Saturday-Sunday:** **Heavy snow likely (80-100% chance)**, accumulations of up to 1 inch possible each day
- **Next Week:** Prolonged snow pattern, possibly HEAVY snow Wed-Thu

**⛓️ Chain requirements may be implemented** – Carry chains and check conditions before travel.

---

### **Highway 20 (North Cascades Highway)** 🔴 CLOSED

**Status:** **PARTIALLY CLOSED** as of 2/18/2026
- Closed at **Milepost 134 (Ross Dam Trailhead)**
- Snow and avalanche hazards typically close the highway late November/early December
- Expected reopening: **April or early May** (weather dependent)

**Related Closures:**
- **Cascade River Road:** CLOSED (flooding/landslide damage from December storms)
- **Stehekin Valley Road:** CLOSED due to landslides – do not travel to Stehekin area

---

### **SR-20 to Anacortes (San Juan Islands Ferry Terminal)** ✅ OPEN

**Status:** The route from I-5 to Anacortes Ferry Terminal is **OPEN** and accessible.

**Ferry Information:**
- Washington State Ferries operating winter schedule
- **New (March 1, 2026):** 3% credit card fee on ticket purchases
- Current sailing season: **Winter schedule through March 21, 2026**
- Recommend checking [WSDOT Ferries](https://www.wsdot.wa.gov/ferries/schedule/) for real-time sailing status

---

### **I-405 Corridor** ⚠️ CONSTRUCTION + DELAYS

**Weekend Closures Coming (Feb 20-Mar 16):**
- **Feb 20 (Fri 9pm):** Westbound SR-522 lane closures for ramp demolition
- **Feb 27-Mar 2:** Both directions of SR-522 closed
- **Mar 6-9 & Mar 13-16:** Both directions of I-405 expected to close for demolition work

**Current Delays:**
- Southbound AM commutes averaging **40-47 minutes** (vs normal 30-33 min)
- Toll lanes charging up to **$15** during peak congestion

---

### **Highway 2 (Stevens Pass)** ✅ REOPENED

Good news: **Fully reopened Feb 11, 2026** after historic December flooding
- All sections from Skykomish to Leavenworth now open to normal two-way traffic
- Permanent repairs may require closures this summer

---

### 📱 Resources
- **WSDOT Real-Time Map:** wsdot.com/travel/real-time/map
- **Mountain Pass Conditions:** Check before crossing any pass
- **511 WA:** For traffic alerts
content:
# Washington Road Conditions Summary
**Feb 19-20, 2026**

**I-5 Seattle** ⚠️ DELAYS
2 NB lanes closed (Ship Canal Bridge). Express lanes NB only. Commutes 50+ min, 50% longer than normal.

**I-90 Snoqualmie Pass** ⚠️ CAUTION
Currently open. Heavy snow 80-100% chance Sat-Sun. Chain requirements likely.

**Highway 20 North Cascades** 🔴 CLOSED
Closed at MP 134. Reopens April/May.

**SR-20 to Anacortes** ✅ CLEAR
Ferry terminal accessible. Winter ferry schedule active.

**I-405** ⚠️ DELAYS
Weekend closures Feb 20-Mar 16. AM commutes 40-47 min.

**Highway 2 Stevens Pass** ✅ CLEAR
Fully reopened Feb 11 after flooding.

**Highway 99 First Ave S Bridge** ⚠️ CAUTION
2 NB lanes closed, 25 mph. Backup onto Hwy 509.

---
Check wsdot.com/travel for real-time updates.
